## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` reports no errors
- [ ] `ruff format --check src/ tests/` reports no changes needed
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage (or existing tests cover it)
- [ ] No `TODO` / `FIXME` markers left in changed files
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if architecture or key patterns changed
